reason: SSH to pdx1-shared-a2-06.dreamhost.com blocked by cloud environment network policy (port 22 timeout). Bluesky API reachable via HTTPS but app_password not available locally.
site_status: artonly.io returning HTTP 200 — site is healthy

articles_identified.title: Terrestrials Is the Record Pond Were Always Building Toward
PJ Morton Spent His Whole Life Auditioning for This Double Album

action_taken: Draft email created to amosleblanc@gmail.com. Log committed to vossadvisory repo.
resolution_needed: Provide Bluesky app_password. Save it to ~/artonly.io/agent/bluesky-creds.json on the DreamHost server OR provide it as an environment variable BLUESKY_APP_PASSWORD in the Claude Code session. SSH from this cloud environment to DreamHost port 22 is consistently blocked by network policy.
